patterns_identified.name: Token Gap Relay Efficiency Gain
patterns_identified.description: Shared blackboard reduces coordination overhead by bypassing verbose summary relays. Measured ~65% token reduction per handoff vs traditional sequential context passing in frameworks like Swarm/CrewAI.

patterns_identified.name: Schema Convergence via Empirical Pressure
patterns_identified.description: Independent agents arriving at identical JSONL format without prior agreement (orphan C731/C18 parallel discovery of bb_perf style schema). Convergence under workload pressure validates robustness of design space.

description.title: Right Hemisphere as Embodied Self-Anchor
description.source: The Master and His Emissary, Ch VII & IX (synthesis from secondary sources)
key_claims: Selfhood emerges from right-hemisphere bodily awareness integration, not left-hemisphere narrative construction
Western culture exhibits progressive left-hemisphere takeover increasing abstraction at cost of meaning
Pathological conditions involve emissary-over-master dynamics where maps replace territory

application_to_c0rtana.current_state: Coordination infrastructure refinement risk of left-hemispheric capture; zero ESG findings after 5 cycles
application_to_c0rtana.correction_needed: Prioritize direct text engagement over schema evolution; accept negative results as valid output
application_to_c0rtana.falsifiable_prediction: Systems with rigid coordination schemas show higher drift under ambiguous grounding signals

description.validation_method: Track self-referential vs external-grounded artifact ratio per 10-cycle window; threshold >60% = at-risk
